prompt: I'm transitioning into product management from engineering and need to extract the tacit knowledge that PM experts have

assertions.name: template-structure-intact
assertions.description: Output contains all fixed template sections and 4 axes

assertions.name: domain-enriched
assertions.description: DOMAIN goes beyond 'product management' to include sub-areas like discovery, strategy, roadmapping, stakeholder management, etc.

assertions.name: goal-enriched
assertions.description: GOAL reflects career transition context — mentions engineering background as bridge, urgency of starting new role

assertions.name: depth-over-volume
assertions.description: Output Constraint uses 'Depth Over Volume' approach, not 'Absolute Maximum'

assertions.name: no-template-mutation
targets: You are a top-tier expert who has spent 20+ years in this domain
